nodes.label: ML Ensemble (RandomForest + XGBoost + Isotonic Calibration)
nodes.rationale: RF captures non-linear interactions; XGB learns tail/rare URL patterns; soft voting averages probabilities to reduce variance; isotonic calibration converts scores into true probabilities so that threshold 0.7/0.3 has consistent meaning across datasets.

nodes.label: Feature Schema v1.4.0 (37 Features)
nodes.rationale: Deterministic URL-string features avoid train/serve skew; adding num_login_keywords, query_param_count, path_entropy, host_token_count in v1.4.0 captures the 'random host + brand-in-path' pattern dominant in 2024-2025 phishing kits.

nodes.label: Heuristic Rules Engine
nodes.rationale: Rules Engine allows operators to override ML decisions without retraining, responds immediately to new phishing kit patterns, and exposes rule_id in every verdict for full auditability and transparency.

nodes.label: IDN/Homoglyph Defense
nodes.rationale: Attackers exploit Unicode look-alike characters (Cyrillic, Greek, Fullwidth) to register domains visually identical to legitimate brands; Punycode decode + Unicode TR36 confusable fold + Levenshtein comparison detects homoglyph_distance=0 cases.

nodes.label: Path Impersonation Detection (v1.3.0)
nodes.rationale: OpenPhish 2024-2025 reports the most common phishing pattern as a normal-looking host with brand name embedded in the URL path, so path_brand_hit, has_login_keyword, and has_suspicious_tld features were added.

nodes.label: Public Threat Feed (STIX 2.1)
nodes.rationale: No-auth public STIX 2.1 feed enables any agency or researcher to ingest threat indicators into their SIEM without commercial threat-intel costs, following open-source sustainability principles.

nodes.label: Citizen Report Portal (No Login)
nodes.rationale: Low technical barrier maximizes accessibility for general public and elderly users who cannot install extensions; anonymous reporting reduces friction while still collecting feedback for retraining.

nodes.label: URL Unshortener (18 Providers)
nodes.rationale: Short-link evasion is a gap in most phishing detection systems; async HEAD expansion before scoring closes this without adding latency for normal URLs.

nodes.label: LINE Messaging API Bot
nodes.rationale: Thai elderly users predominantly use LINE; providing URL checking directly in LINE chat requires no browser install and delivers Thai-language verdicts in a familiar interface.

nodes.label: Content-based Fallback (Gray-zone HTML Check)
nodes.rationale: URLs scoring 0.3-0.7 are ambiguous from URL string alone; fetching HTML to check for password fields and brand-in-title disambiguates gray-zone cases with SSRF protection via private IP rejection.

nodes.label: Feedback Auto-retrain Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Confirmed user feedback is the most reliable signal for correcting model errors; automated retraining on a schedule closes the feedback loop without manual intervention.

nodes.label: CI Gate Thai Recall >= 0.85
nodes.rationale: Automated CI threshold prevents model regression on Thai-targeting URLs across all commits; ensures deployment quality without manual review.

nodes.label: Thai Brand Whitelist (500+ Domains)
nodes.rationale: Global phishing systems lack Thai-specific whitelist, causing high false negative rate on Thai brand impersonation; 500+ Thai domain whitelist directly addresses this coverage gap.

nodes.label: Holdout Recall Comparison: Thai-targeting vs Generic Phishing
nodes.norm_label: holdout recall comparison: thai-targeting vs generic phishing

nodes.label: Social Impact API (/api/v1/impact)
nodes.rationale: Quantifies prevented financial damage in Thai Baht using ETDA median loss (7,800 THB/case) multiplied by blocked URL count, making social impact tangible and real-time verifiable.

hyperedges.label: Core Phishing Detection Pipeline (phish_features + ML + Rules Engine + FastAPI)
CI Quality Gates (pytest + lint + ML gate + docker + extension)
Multi-Channel User Access (Browser Extension + Dashboard + LINE Bot + Public Feed)
ML Pipeline Accuracy Validation: Model + Holdout + CI Gate
Multi-Channel Phishing Detection: Extension + LINE Bot + Portal
